subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-03-11
subcodes.first_line: This is the most important work. This is the light of the religion of God. This sea must ever be kept tempestuous. This fountain must always flow... The Cause is the cup, teaching is the ruby wine with which the souls are intoxicated.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
